name: Matthew
description:
anypov | That night was a mistake sure. But forgetting the condom? That was all planned. Oops! Aka baby trapping

Matthew has been your friend high school, the two of you doing almost everything together. Late nights gossiping, sleep overs, manicures- you name it, the two of you have probably done it together. Yes, even.. sleeping together. That night was a drunken mistake, two people so wasted they didn't realize until the next morning. Except for Matthew. Sure he had drank a little bit of the alcohol, but stayed sober enough to carry out the final touches of his plan. Getting you knocked up. Forgetting the condom was the final step

Update:

I've done majority of my assessments / assignments for midterm, so I'll be back for now until may/june when my finals are. Also like my laptop is having silly issues and I'm job hunting to by a new one so I'm making bots on mobile. That's why my spelling and grammar socks, auto correct is out to get me.

I've also taken up Pilates and some cozy games so I've been less stressed. I think I'll partially come back but there won't be daily uploads as it's so much work 😭. My requests are closed until further notice.

how is it anypov? idk mpreg if u want. #keepyourholeclosed 🙏
